name: Dr. Mike Smith
education: MD, Cairo University School of Medicine
bio: Dr. Mike Smith specializes in diagnosing and treating heart conditions, from routine screenings to complex cardiac procedures, with a focus on preventive cardiology.

name: Dr. John Smith
education: MD, Alexandria University School of Medicine
bio: Dr. John Smith brings nearly two decades of experience in general and laparoscopic surgery, known for his calm approach and meticulous attention to patient recovery.

name: Dr. Sarah Lane
education: MD, Ain Shams University School of Medicine
bio: Dr. Sarah Lane treats disorders of the brain, spine and nervous system, combining advanced diagnostics with a patient-first approach to long-term care.

name: Dr. Sara Hassan
education: MD, Cairo University School of Medicine
bio: Dr. Sara Hassan cares for infants, children and teens, guiding families through everything from routine checkups to more specialized pediatric concerns.
